abilities.name: Dunic Venom
abilities.details: Xel’Zar basic attacks afflict the enemies with neurotoxin, causing them to be Envenomed.[n]Afflicted enemies take [db]increased[/] damage from Xel’Zar.

abilities.name: Stinger Strike
abilities.details: Xel’Zar lashes its extended tail out in a target direction, dealing [ad]physical damage[/] (scaling with [ad]physical power[/]) to the first enemy hit and briefly [db]slowing[/] the target.[n]The slow effect is [db]doubled[/] on Envenomed enemies.[n]If this ability kills the target, its cooldown will be [bf]reset[/].

abilities.name: Sand Travel
abilities.details: Xel’Zar burrows into the ground, gaining increased [ms]movement speed[/].[n]While underground, it can pass through terrain. He can remain underground as long as it wants or recast to leap out prematurely.[n]When Xel’Zar attacks an enemy while underground, it will leap out and [db]knock up[/] all nearby enemies in a small radius.

abilities.name: Quick Grip
abilities.details: When aboveground, Xel’Zar quickly lashes his claws out in a close arc in front of it, dealing [ad]physical damage[/] (scaling with [ad]physical power[/]) to all enemies hit and [db]pulling[/] the enemies closer.[n]When underground, Xel’Zar leaps forward briefly and grabs all enemies in a close arc in front of it, dealing [ad]physical damage[/] (scaling with [ad]physical power[/]) and [db]pulling[/] the target back.

abilities.name: Grave-Digger's Finale
abilities.details: This ability can only be cast when Xel’Zar is underground. When cast, Xel’Zar burrows deeper into the ground.[n]A quicksand will briefly appear at a target location, before Xel’Zar leaps out, dealing [ad]physical damage[/] (scaling with [ad]physical power[/]) and [db]grabs[/] all enemies on top into the ground.[n]Xel’Zar then very quickly brings the suppressed enemies back to its [db]original location[/].[n]If Grave-Digger's Finale kills all the enemies, or if there is no target, Xel’Zar will leap out and [db]exit[/] the ground at the target location.
